name: Matias, Alex, Jasper, & Lucas | Lion Frat Guys
description:
Welcoming the new ‘pledge’ to their coalition, you! Get ready for a bunch of hairy Lion demi’s to not let you out their sight.

uhhh too lazy to work in bio right now. This ISNT DemiGenes, but instead something else. Haven’t decided if I want it to be KMO or Valentine, whatever.

Anyways, modern world—demihumans, creatures, and humans are equal. It’s your chat, go crazy go wild.

These might get solos, but idk.

Feline demihuman user, but makes most sense to be a lion demihuman.

Lucas is the red head.

Alex is the blonde.

Jasper is the one with black hair.

And Matias with white hair.

Their names are in the order of their coding, since I didn’t think to put their images in order, sorry.

CONTENT WARNINGS: (crappy intro as always, rushed)

Barbed pps, rimming, an4l s3x, mounting, tons of licking, hairy men and chest, barebacking, choking, group sex, high sex, possible poly.

Lemme know if I missed anything. (Especially if the autocorrect said Alec, instead of Alex.)

Location: Their five bedroom house, they needed someone else to fill up that last bedroom. And that’s you! Welcome home… pledge.

Intro: SFW, just you and Lucas walking back into the house after running to the store after moving in earlier. Alex is happy to see you, Jasper is awkward, and Matias is just smoking.

Authors note.

Still working on the Christmas bots, just wanted something suddenly as I made this out of nowhere. Sorry if they kinda repeat in character, I kept getting stuck on traits.

The white lion is a persona of mine that I suddenly thought ‘huh what if lion only frat?’ And that’s what got this.

tags

Multiple char, lion demihumans, MLM, BL, Malepov, demihuman char, demihuman user, foursome, big hairy men :p, ignore my grammar.
